prompt:
Use case: identity-preserve
Asset type: runtime tactics unit sprite rework
Primary request: preserve this exact approved Order Squire Operative sprite, especially the visible face and hood framing, but remove the warm yellowish hue and match the clearer Order material separation of the approved House Marshal redo
Subject: the exact approved Squire Operative with the same visible face, same glowing eyes, same narrow exposed cheek and nose structure, same hood opening and hood shape, same firearm shape and pose, same off-hand orb gadget, same armor layout, same tabard shape, same pouch arrangement, same silhouette, and same planted stance
Style/medium: preserve the exact painterly pixel-art-inspired tactics sprite finish, moderate pixelation level, readable broad shapes, and runtime-game clarity of the approved sprite; rendered around 100px tall in game, so prioritize strong shape readability and reduced micro-detail
Composition/framing: preserve the exact same full-body crop, stance, orientation, pose, and tight sprite bounds; do not redesign or reinterpret anything
Lighting/mood: same bunker-forged military mood as the approved sprite, but with less muddy amber haze and clearer separation between steel, cloth, and leather
Color palette: preserve the exact Order palette already present in the approved sprite: weathered iron black, aged brass, dark wine red, parchment ivory, and small red gadget lights; use the approved House Marshal redo only as a color-balance and material-clarity anchor, not as a structural reference
Materials/textures: lighter bunker armor, worn cloth hood and tabard, leather pouches, compact relic firearm, gadget metal
Constraints: change only color balance, contrast grouping, and material clarity; preserve the exact visible face read from the approved sprite, exact hood opening, exact hood silhouette, exact armor plate shapes, exact firearm shape and position, exact orb gadget, exact cloth shapes, exact proportions, exact pose, and exact faction identity; this must still read as the same approved unit, not a redesign; exactly one subject; no floor; no scenery; no text; no extra subjects; alpha only outside the outer silhouette; avoid oversized transparent padding
Avoid: face fully shadowed, face hidden behind cloth, full mask, any hood redesign, any pose change, any silhouette drift, any new details, any removed details, blue sci-fi tint, cyan lighting, desaturation, glossy rendering, anime rendering, noisy micro-detail, soft blur, cinematic background
